name: Joe Sheldon
description: I transplanted to Seattle in 2009, and the Pacific Northwest has become my new home. I am in love with its natural beauty and the abundance of year-round activities. Having grown up around the construction business, I developed a deep understanding of what makes a good home. My real estate passion comes from my desire to help you navigate the journey of purchasing one of the largest yet most personal items of your lifetime. I joined Redfin in 2014 to pursue this passion relentlessly. I like my customers to think of me as their coach throughout the entire process. My team and I will give you expert guidance at every turn, and I'll be by your side through the ups and downs. You can expect me to provide honest advice and tireless advocacy.

name: Christina Woollen
description: Buying, selling, or investing - let’s make it an adventure you’ll actually enjoy. My goal is simple: to get you the best outcome while keeping you informed, supported, and genuinely cared for every step of the way. From our first chat to closing day and beyond, I’ll be there to guide you, answer your questions, and celebrate every win. Backed by the Redfin team, I bring market insight, helpful tools, and a people-first approach. Consistently earning 5-star reviews, I’m here to help you step into a place that truly feels like home.

name: Carly Ozuna
description: I've been a Loan Officer for over 10 years, specializing in residential mortgages and personalized financing strategies. I’m passionate about helping clients navigate the loan process with clarity and ease. I love working locally—it allows me to build lasting relationships and support my community firsthand.

name: Desirae Pepperdine
description: To ensure your home makes an unforgettable first impression on potential buyers, I work hand-in-hand with Desirae, who serves as the marketing and logistical powerhouse of my team. She is dedicated entirely to the seamless, stress-free preparation and launch of your home on the market. From scheduling our professional videographers and ordering yard signs to meticulously entering your home's data so it syndicates flawlessly across Redfin and the MLS, she handles the vital details behind the scenes. Her specialized support ensures your listing looks absolutely pristine the moment it goes live, allowing me to focus my energy entirely on pricing strategy, buyer outreach, and negotiating top dollar for your home.

name: Beth Davis
description: Once your offer is accepted and we are officially under contract, Beth steps in to serve as our dedicated escrow and paperwork champion. Real estate transactions involve an intense timeline of strict deadlines, legal disclosures, and financial milestones, and Beth's sole focus is keeping our deal moving perfectly on track for a smooth closing. She collaborates directly with me, you, the title company, lenders, and the opposing agent to ensure every piece of compliance paperwork is flawlessly executed and submitted on time. With them meticulously managing the administrative timeline, you can breathe easy knowing no detail is overlooked, allowing me to stay focused on overseeing the full transaction and advising you through the inspection, appraisal, and final negotiations.

name: Ben Coffee
description: Behind the scenes of our journey is my Sales Manager, a veteran real estate leader who oversees our local market operations and ensures our team always delivers the highest standard of service. While I am your primary point of contact and dedicated advocate, my Sales Manager acts as a trusted strategic advisor, providing an extra layer of expert oversight, market insight, and resource backing for our transaction. Having their leadership integrated into my workflow means you don't just get my individual expertise; you have a built-in executive support system ensuring that your sale or purchase is executed with the utmost precision and professional excellence. Ben is the Sales Manager for Redfin's Seattle-North Market, ranging from Shoreline to Bellingham.

name: Rick Wright
description: You can find the right place at the right time, and it's my privilege to guide you safely along that journey. To do that, I keep my eyes on property values and market trends, and work closely with a large network to be sure things go smoothly. With a collaborative approach, I'll equip you with info and tools to confidently buy and sell homes. I know how challenging a move can be. First licensed in 2007 in Seattle, I've had stints in the Nashville and Washington DC markets as well as locally from Bonney Lake up to Bellingham. A musician, coffee enthusiast and teacher turned realtor, I am lucky to live in my favorite place on earth here in the PNW with my lovely wife, two children and two cats. I can’t wait to get to work with you.

name: Leslie Bontecou
description:
Coverage Area: North Sound
To make sure my clients never miss out on seeing a hot new listing the moment it hits the market, I am backed by my incredible licensed, local real estate professional team called Associate Agents. Think of them as an on-the-ground extension of me - fully integrated members of my team who step in to open doors, host tours, or attend inspections whenever I’m tied up negotiating an offer or advocating for another client. We collaborate seamlessly behind the scenes, meaning every note and piece of feedback from your home visits comes straight back to me so we can strategize our next move. This teamwork ensures you get the absolute best of both worlds: my dedicated contract expertise and negotiation guidance, paired with a responsive, hyper-local team ready to move at lightning speed whenever you need us.
